headings.usage: Use Outfit for all headings. It brings a friendly yet highly legible geometric feel, breaking away from standard SaaS Inter.

body.usage: Manrope is highly legible even at small sizes, crucial for nurses looking at their phones in stressful conditions.

primary.description: Terracotta - adds warmth, life, and stands out from generic medical blues.

accent.description: Sage Green - represents healing, calmness, and success states (e.g., optimized route).

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #E7E5E4 (stone-200) everywhere to create 'Neo-Brutalist' crisp utility without hard black lines.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Use shadow-sm for cards. Focus on 1px borders instead of heavy shadows.
visual_enhancers.border_radius: rounded-2xl for major containers, rounded-xl for inner elements.
visual_enhancers.textures: No heavy gradients. Flat, matte colors. Keep the UI feeling like premium paper/tactile material.

components.dashboard: Use the 'Bento' grid layout. Asymmetrical grid (e.g., md:grid-cols-8) to display stats, next visit, and a stylized map.
components.hipaa_badge: A persistent pill-shaped badge floating at the top-right or bottom-right of the screen. Needs a pulsing green dot animation to indicate active protection. Do not make the background completely transparent.
components.voice_notes: A prominent FAB or fixed button. On click, open a 'Glassmorphism' modal covering the screen, showing a large animated soundwave or pulsing circle and real-time mock transcription.
components.map: Stylized map. Instead of standard Google Maps UI, use the provided warm line art map background with absolutely positioned numbered 'Stops' (1, 2, 3) connected by a dashed SVG line. Adds a designed, premium feel.
components.schedule_builder: List of clients with drag-and-drop affordances (mocked visually). Show preferred time windows next to each.
components.cards: Remove Vercel-look. Flat white background, 1px stone-200 border, no generic shadow. Inner padding p-6.

grids_and_layouts.spacing: Generous. p-6 to p-8 inside cards. gap-6 between dashboard elements.
grids_and_layouts.mobile_first: Ensure text is large enough (text-base default) and touch targets are min 44x44px. Images/Maps must not exceed 60vh on mobile.

motion.transitions: Use specific properties: transition-colors duration-200, transition-transform duration-300.
motion.hover_states: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) for interactive cards, background color shifts for buttons.
motion.voice_animation: When voice recording is active, use a continuous scale animation (pulse) on the microphone button.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast. Dark text on light background. White text on primary buttons.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY. Add data-testid to all interactive elements, e.g., data-testid='hipaa-badge', data-testid='voice-record-btn'.

media.icons: Use lucide-react. Choose icons with soft, rounded edges to match the organic tone.

image_urls.description: Smiling nurse portrait for the user profile.
Abstract line art to act as the stylized map background.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You MUST build this prototype completely in the frontend, mocking interactions and data using useState and standard React patterns.
Do not use generic centered layouts or simplistic UI slop. Use the specified font and color system strictly.
The HIPAA privacy badge must be persistent across all screens.
Implement the 'stylized map mockup' as an interactive element using the provided background image overlayed with absolute positioned SVGs/Nodes indicating stops and the route.
Create a beautiful Voice-to-Text modal component for visit notes. When opened, it should have a 'listening' state and slowly type out text to mock transcription.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent: Read this JSON. Use Outfit for Headings and Manrope for Body (load from Google Fonts in index.html). Setup the mock data for clients and today's schedule. Implement a multi-page feel (Dashboard, Route Map, Client List) using state-based navigation. Focus on the premium, calm UI with Terracotta and Sage green. DO NOT use generic blue buttons or completely transparent overlays.
general_ui_ux_guidelines: Always ensure text color is high-contrast. Avoid universal `transition: all`. Do not center-align the main app layout (avoid `text-align: center` on body). Keep typography left-aligned except for major numbers. Ensure spacing is 2x larger than standard SaaS default.
